name: Aspire Biopharma Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview Aspire is an early-stage biopharmaceutical company. As a Delaware corporation formed in February 2025, the Company engages in the business of developing and marketing the disruptive technology for novel sublingual delivery mechanisms initially for known drugs. Prior to our Business Combination we were a privately held Puerto Rico corporation incorporated in September 2021. Our internet address is www.aspirebiolabs.com.
